info.name: Peelin' Good - Backend API v1
info.description: Workshop 7 REST API (Spring Boot). Copy `apps/backend/.env.example` to `.env` / `.env.local` for local secrets. With the server running: Swagger UI at `/swagger-ui/index.html`, OpenAPI JSON at `/v3/api-docs`. Variables: `baseUrl` (default `http://localhost:8080`), `token` (set by Login requests), and path ids such as `productId`, `orderId`, `orderNumber`.

request.description: Returns 501 until Google/Microsoft OAuth callback is implemented.
302 redirect to SPA after OAuth; normally used from a browser session, not Postman.
